content: Governed automation objective: Automate comms-tab prompt construction. Task detail: Move prompt-building components behind an automated pipeline so the visible interface becomes standard chat input/output with a small operations panel that streams prompt-construction steps as they happen. Phase objective: Automate prompt-building inside the comms tab so the user experience collapses to standard chat input/output plus a compact operations display showing prompt construction in real time.

Governed automation execution target: Build backend prompt-construction pipeline. This is the first active implementation slice under comms-tab prompt automation. It owns backend prompt assembly, governed prompt-construction steps, and structured event emission for downstream operations display work.

Implement automation audit logging as the next governed automation slice. Victor automation must emit append-only run-started, action, and run-completed records with run IDs, governance outcomes, actor labels, and before/after task mutation snapshots so overnight activity is reviewable.
